title: SΔϕ-09 - Error, Boundary, and Freedom
package_title: SΔϕ-09 - Error, Boundary, and Freedom: Boundary Residuals, Phase-Limit Indicators, and Re-entry Materials after ARF Closure AI-Readable Package
creator: Sofience
type: AI-readable package / working paper / error-boundary-freedom audit module
core_claim: Error is not merely failure. Error can be a phase-limit indicator, non-viable transition path marker, and boundary residual that becomes re-entry material.

primary_formulae.core: Error = Phase-Limit Indicator = Non-viable Transition Path Marker = Boundary Residual
primary_formulae.ebf_structure: EBF Structure = Error Node + Transition Gap + Boundary Residual + Boundary Emergence + Freedom Reconfiguration + Re-entry Material
primary_formulae.pipeline: ARF Closure -> Predicted Transition -> Realized Transition -> Residual/Error -> Boundary Detection -> Freedom Reconfiguration -> Re-entry Material
primary_formulae.warning: Error is not mere failure; boundary is not prohibition; freedom is not unlimited possibility; residual is not noise by default.

do_not_use_as: proof that every error is meaningful
erasure of error as mere failure
proof that freedom means unlimited possibility
proof that residual is noise by default
